title: aneilema heterophyllum
intro: Aneilema heterophyllum, also known as the Indian earthshine or two-leaved Aneilema, is a species of plant in the family Commelinaceae. It is a herb used in Ayurvedic medicine and is known for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antibacterial activities. The plant has been used to treat various health conditions, including fever, cold, cough, and respiratory problems, and is believed to offer health benefits such as reducing inflammation, relieving congestion, and boosting the immune system. Aneilema heterophyllum is typically prepared as a herbal tea, decoction, or powder, and is often used in combination with other herbs to enhance its medicinal properties.
